news.t: Eventide Announces Launch of Three New Systematic ETFs (NYSE Arca: ESLG, ESLV, ESSC)

holdings.infoBox: ESLV is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 4.81%, The Home Depot at 2.86%, Duke Energy at 2.46%, Medtronic at 2.41%, and ConocoPhillips at 2.35%.

overview.description: The Eventide Large Cap Value ETF (ESLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund provides exposure to large-cap US value companies. The actively managed fund selects equity securities using fundamental research that includes a values-based screening inspired by the Christian faith. ESLV was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Eventide.

data.title: Eventide Announces Launch of Three New Systematic ETFs (NYSE Arca: ESLG, ESLV, ESSC)
data.text: BOSTON , Sept. 30, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Eventide Asset Management, LLC, a Boston-based investment adviser, announces the launch of three systematic ETFs: the Eventide Large Cap Growth ETF (ESLG), Even...
